---
title: "AnalogToTensor & TensorToAnalog"
---

## Overview

Phase 1 of the [multi-channel storage roadmap](../DataObjects/multi_channel_storage_and_transforms.qmd).
These transforms bridge independent `AnalogTimeSeries` channels and a unified `TensorData`
representation suitable for cross-channel operations.

### AnalogToTensor

N-ary container transform: packs N `AnalogTimeSeries` into one 2D `TensorData`
(rows = time samples, columns = channels).

### TensorToAnalog

Extracts selected columns from a 2D `TensorData` as independent owning
`AnalogTimeSeries` objects.

## Location

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `src/TransformsV2/algorithms/AnalogToTensor/AnalogToTensor.hpp` | AnalogToTensor header |
| `src/TransformsV2/algorithms/AnalogToTensor/AnalogToTensor.cpp` | AnalogToTensor implementation |
| `src/TransformsV2/algorithms/TensorToAnalog/TensorToAnalog.hpp` | TensorToAnalog header |
| `src/TransformsV2/algorithms/TensorToAnalog/TensorToAnalog.cpp` | TensorToAnalog implementation |
| `src/TransformsV2/algorithms/AnalogToTensor/AnalogToTensor.test.cpp` | Tests for both transforms |

## AnalogToTensor Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `channel_prefix` | `std::string` | `""` | Prefix to match AnalogTimeSeries keys in DataManager |
| `channel_keys` | `std::vector<std::string>` | `{}` | Selected DataManager keys (used as column names) |

## TensorToAnalog Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `output_key_prefix` | `std::string` | `""` | Prefix for generated AnalogTimeSeries keys |
| `columns` | `std::vector<int>` | `{}` | Column indices to extract (empty = all columns) |

## Function Signatures

Unlike standard 1-input container transforms, these have non-standard signatures
because AnalogToTensor takes N inputs and TensorToAnalog produces N outputs:

```cpp
// N AnalogTimeSeries â†’ 1 TensorData
auto analogToTensor(
    std::vector<std::shared_ptr<AnalogTimeSeries const>> const & channels,
    AnalogToTensorParams const & params,
    ComputeContext const & ctx) -> std::shared_ptr<TensorData>;

// 1 TensorData â†’ N AnalogTimeSeries
auto tensorToAnalog(
    TensorData const & input,
    TensorToAnalogParams const & params,
    ComputeContext const & ctx) -> std::vector<std::shared_ptr<AnalogTimeSeries>>;
```

## Algorithm

### AnalogToTensor

1. Validate all channels share the same `TimeFrame` (pointer identity) and sample count.
2. Build flat row-major data by iterating each channel via `viewValues()` (mmap-safe).
3. Return `TensorData::createTimeSeries2D(...)` preserving the shared `TimeFrame`
   and `TimeIndexStorage`.

### TensorToAnalog

1. Determine columns to extract (all if `columns` is empty).
2. For each column, call `TensorData::getColumn(i)` to get an owning copy.
3. If the tensor has `RowType::TimeFrameIndex`, preserve time indices via
   `RowDescriptor::timeStoragePtr()->getAllTimeIndices()`.
4. Set the `TimeFrame` from the source tensor on each output.

## Constraints

### AnalogToTensor

- Channels vector must not be empty
- All channels must have identical sample counts
- All channels must share the same `TimeFrame` (pointer identity)
- Returns `nullptr` on validation failure

### TensorToAnalog

- Input must be 2D
- Column indices must be in `[0, numColumns())`
- Returns empty vector on validation failure

## Round-Trip

```
N Ă— AnalogTimeSeries  â†’  analogToTensor()  â†’  TensorData  â†’  tensorToAnalog()  â†’  N Ă— AnalogTimeSeries
```

Values are preserved exactly. Time indices and TimeFrame are preserved for
`TimeFrameIndex`-typed tensors.

::: {.callout-note}
Phase 1 creates owning copies in TensorToAnalog. Phase 3 will replace this
with zero-copy `TensorColumnAnalogStorage` views into the Armadillo matrix.
:::
